full_text:
Wang Fan (Yongyuan) 王蕃 (永元)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Fan (王蕃), styledYongyuan (永元), was born in Lujiang. Honest but didn’t always obey orders. An astronomer and mathematician. Killed by Sun Hao. Wang Fan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Wang Fan lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
